title: 天皇賞（春）の後に・輝き、揺らめいて

text_block_list.name: Caster
text_block_list.text:
And it's Dober in the lead! Dober's at the head of
the pack!

text_block_list.name: Caster
text_block_list.text:
And she's done it! She's outpaced her fellow
Mejiro racer and emerged victorious!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: Wooooo!

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Dober
text_block_list.text: Huff, huff, huff...

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Bright
text_block_list.text: ...That was fantastic, Dober.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Dober
text_block_list.text: Bright... Th-thanks.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Bright
text_block_list.text:
Teehee. There's no need to look so conflicted!
You should hold your head up high.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Bright
text_block_list.text:
Claiming a Tenno Sho plaque is a very meaningful
accomplishment for us Mejiros.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Bright
text_block_list.text:
Now then, lift your head, pull back your
shoulders, and...

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Dober
text_block_list.text: Bright?

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Bright
text_block_list.text: M-my apologies.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Dober
text_block_list.text: Oh, Bright!

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Bright
text_block_list.text: Sniff... Hic...

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Bright
text_block_list.text: Sob!

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Bright
text_block_list.text:
I wasn't supposed to lose here... This was the one
race I couldn't afford to lose, and yet!

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Bright
text_block_list.text:
I'm so pathetic! All I've done is make you carry
the weight of our promise all by yourself!

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Bright
text_block_list.text: I cannot let things end here.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Bright
text_block_list.text: I must accomplish what I set out to do.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Bright
text_block_list.text:
We must surpass the victories that previous
Mejiro racers like McQueen and Ryan claimed
before us...

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Bright
text_block_list.text: And forge our own glorious legacies!

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Bright
text_block_list.text: Well... I suppose I must start training anew.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Dober
text_block_list.text: Bright...

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Dober
text_block_list.text:
(Bright seems like a different person. She feels
strong and dignified, just like... Yeah. She's just
like Air Groove.)

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Dober
text_block_list.text:
You're so incredible, Bright. What do I have to do
in order to be like y—

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Dober
text_block_list.text: ...Huh?

text_block_list.name: Air Groove
text_block_list.text:
Mejiro Dober. As you are right now, the future
and glory you crave are far beyond your reach.

text_block_list.name: Air Groove
text_block_list.text:
Because those are things that only one person in
the world can ever claim.

text_block_list.name: Air Groove
text_block_list.text: And that person is Mejiro Dober.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Dober
text_block_list.text: Huh? When...

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Dober
text_block_list.text:
When did I start wanting to become someone
else?

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Dober
text_block_list.text:
When did I decide that it was enough to claim the
same achievements as someone else?

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Mejiro Dober doesn't say a word on our way back
from the Kyoto Racecourse.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
It's only after we arrive at my office that she
begins to speak.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Dober
text_block_list.text: I finally understand now.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Dober
text_block_list.text:
I understand what you were trying to say after the
Osaka Hai, and what Air Groove meant.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Dober
text_block_list.text:
I understand what you were trying to say after the
Osaka Hai, and what Air Groove meant.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Dober
text_block_list.text:
I know why I can't become like Air Groove,
Bright, or another Mejiro.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Dober
text_block_list.text: I can't become someone else. I have to be me... right?

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Dober
text_block_list.text:
I want to continue the legacy Ramonu left
behind...

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Dober
text_block_list.text:
The reason I decided to race in the Triple Tiara
was because I wanted to be like Ramonu.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Dober
text_block_list.text:
If I walk the path she walked and reach the
heights she reached... Maybe if I become like
her...

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Dober
text_block_list.text:
And the reason I picked this race schedule for my
senior year was because I wanted to be like Air
Groove.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Dober
text_block_list.text:
Even today, I was thinking about how great it
would be to be like Bright.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Dober
text_block_list.text: But I'm not like them...

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Dober
text_block_list.text:
McQueen, Ryan, Bright, Air Groove, and
everyone else...

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Dober
text_block_list.text: They run with their own strength on their own path in their own way! They're determined to make themselves shine! That's what makes them strong.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Dober
text_block_list.text: But I don't have that confidence.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Dober
text_block_list.text:
I don't have the resolve to make myself shine! So I
just followed them, hoping to pick up scraps of
their light along the way.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Dober
text_block_list.text:
But doing that won't work. I can't forge a new
Mejiro legacy that way.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Dober
text_block_list.text: Not while I'm so weak!

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Dober
text_block_list.text: Yes, I am!

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Dober
text_block_list.text:
I appreciate the fact that you always reassure me.
Really, I do.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Dober
text_block_list.text:
I appreciate the fact that you always reassure me.
Really, I do.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Dober
text_block_list.text: But I want to confront my problems head-on. I need to.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Dober
text_block_list.text: I can't keep ignoring the bad stuff. I have to admit that I'm a sneaky weakling.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Dober
text_block_list.text: But still... You believe in me.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Dober
text_block_list.text: But still... You believe in me.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Dober
text_block_list.text: You believe that I can overcome my weakness.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Dober
text_block_list.text:
You have faith that I'm strong enough to do
that... right?

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Dober
text_block_list.text: Yeah. I knew you'd say that.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Dober
text_block_list.text: I'm going to run in the Takarazuka Kinen.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Dober
text_block_list.text:
But I'm not doing it because I want to chase after
Air Groove or because I want to be like someone
else.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Dober
text_block_list.text:
I'm going to run in it so I can conquer my
weakness.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Dober
text_block_list.text: I'm running in it so I can become truly strong.
